articles.title: Enhanced Performance For Server Consolidation With Intel Xeon 6+
How courts are coping with a flood of AI-generated lawsuits
articles.description: Most days in her chambers, Judge Maritza Braswell, a federal magistrate judge in Colorado, sifts through stacks of documents written by people without a lawyer.
